title: project.orca.yaml
description: Declarative build specification for the orca orchestrator.

name.description: Build name. Used for display, .orca/ directory path, and commit messages.

project_dir.description: Target project root, relative to this file.

model.description: Default Claude model for all stages.

workflows.description: Named workflow templates. Tasks can reference these by name via the 'workflow' field.

prompts.description: Prompt injection. 'context' is prepended to every stage. 'stages' provides per-stage text.

context.description: Text prepended to every stage prompt. Use for project-wide context.

stages.description: Per-stage text blocks. Keys are stage names, values are appended to that stage's prompt.

orca.description: Live-reloadable overrides. Re-read at the top of each iteration.

tasks.description: Task definitions. Load from external file, define inline, or both.

file.description: Path to external tasks file (relative to project.orca.yaml).

taskDefaults.description: Default values applied to every task. Per-task values override.

variables.description: Default template variables. Task variables extend these (deep merge).

id.description: Unique task identifier. Used in eval commands ({task_id}), file paths, depends_on.

title.description: Display name for TUI and logs.

depends_on.description: Task IDs that must pass before this task starts. Empty array = no dependencies.

variables.description: Freeform template variables injected into stage prompts. Orca never interprets these.

workflow.description: Named workflow to use for this task. References a key in the top-level 'workflows' map.

eval.description: Evaluation configuration. Runs a command and parses output to determine pass/fail.

command.description: Shell command to run. Supports {task_id} and other template variables.

parser.description: How to parse the command output.

results_file.description: Also write eval results to this path (relative to project_dir). Supports {task_id}.

workflow.description: Stage execution order. Setup runs once, pre/post run per task, loop iterates.

setup.description: Stage to run once before all tasks.

pre.description: Stages to run once per task, before the iteration loop.

loop.description: The iteration loop. First stage should be 'eval'. Repeats until eval passes or budget exhausted.

post.description: Stages to run after the loop passes.

stages.description: Stage definitions. Each key is a stage name referenced in the workflow.

type.description: Stage type. agent=Claude invocation, command=shell command, eval=run+parse. Inferred if omitted.

gate.description: Require status:'passed' in output. Restarts the loop on failure.

builtin.description: Use a built-in prompt/schema by this name regardless of the stage's own name.

toolset.description: Tool preset. read_only=[Read,Glob,Grep], all=[Read,Write,Edit,Bash,Glob,Grep], code=[Read,Write,Edit,Glob,Grep], bash=[Read,Bash,Glob,Grep].

max_turns.description: Maximum agent turns for this stage.

prompt.description: Path to prompt template file (relative to project.orca.yaml). If omitted, auto-loads stages/{stage_name}.prompt.txt.

schema.description: Path to JSON schema for structured output. If omitted, auto-loads stages/{stage_name}.schema.json.

escalation.description: Check stage output for escalation object.

supervisor.description: Invoke supervisor on escalation or stuck detection.

timeout.description: Wall-clock timeout in seconds for this stage.

command.description: Shell command to run. Makes this a command stage (no Claude invocation).

wait_for.description: Health check command, polled every 5s until exit 0. Used with command stages.

wait_timeout.description: Max seconds to wait for wait_for health check.

stageOverrides.description: Per-task stage overrides. Keys are stage names, values override the stage definition.

commit_after.description: When to auto-commit. 'loop' = when iteration loop passes.

scope.description: File access restrictions. Empty arrays or omitted = no restriction.

writable.description: Glob patterns for files the agent can Write/Edit.

readable.description: Glob patterns for files the agent can Read/Glob/Grep.

max_cost.description: Maximum cost in USD per task.

stage_timeout.description: Default wall-clock timeout per stage invocation (seconds).

stuck_window.description: Number of identical consecutive outputs before stuck detection triggers.

supervisor.description: Supervisor agent configuration for handling escalations.

prompt.description: Path to custom supervisor prompt template.

on_budget_warning.description: Notify when this fraction of budget is consumed (e.g., 0.8 = 80%).

enable.description: Set false to disable nix even if flake.nix exists.

flake.description: true = use repo root flake.nix, string = path to flake directory.

packages.description: Nixpkgs to use with nix shell (e.g. [nodejs, bun]).
